mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invite_relation (inviter_id, invitee_id, rewarded, create_time) VALUES (#{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{rewarded}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.inviter_id, ui.username AS inviter_username, ui.nickname AS inviter_nickname, ui.avatar AS inviter_avatar, r.invitee_id, ue.username AS invitee_username, ue.nickname AS invitee_nickname, ue.avatar AS invitee_avatar, r.rewarded, r.create_time FROM invite_relation r JOIN `user` ui ON ui.id = r.inviter_id JOIN `user` ue ON ue.id = r.invitee_id ORDER BY r.inviter_id, r.id

SELECT r.id, r.inviter_id, ui.username AS inviter_username, ui.nickname AS inviter_nickname, ui.avatar AS inviter_avatar, r.invitee_id, ue.username AS invitee_username, ue.nickname AS invitee_nickname, ue.avatar AS invitee_avatar, r.rewarded, r.create_time FROM invite_relation r JOIN `user` ui ON ui.id = r.inviter_id JOIN `user` ue ON ue.id = r.invitee_id WHERE r.inviter_id = #{userId} OR r.invitee_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.inviter_id, r.id
